title: cytisus purgans var. balansae
intro: Cytisus purgans var. balansae, also known as the Scythian or Balansa broom, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a purgative and laxative, due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Cytisus purgans var. balansae include its ability to stimulate bowel movements, relieve constipation, and potentially aid in weight loss. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and extracts, have been used in traditional medicine, but its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
